  "japanese": {
    "About": [
      "それはイエスの変容についてです。",
      "それは修道院の場面についてです。"
    ],
    "Affects": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "AssociatedWith": [
      "それはモーセと関連があります。",
      "それはエリヤと関連があります。",
      "それはシナイ山に関連があります。"
    ],
    "BelongsTo": [

    ],
    "CreatedAround": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "CreatedBy": [
      "それはギリシャの画家ゲオルギオス・クロンツァスによって作成されました。"
    ],
    "CreatedFor": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "CreatedIn": [
      "それは1603年に作成されました。",
      "それはクレタ島で作成されました。"
    ],
    "CreatedTo": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "DevelopedBy": [
      "unknown"

    "FoundedIn": [

    ],
    "HasA": [
      "それは木製パネルにテンペラと金箔を使用しています。",
      "それは高さ25.5インチ（64.7 cm）です。",
      "それは幅15.9インチ（40.3 cm）です。",
      "それは4つの主要な部分を持っています。",
      "それは上部にイエスが中央に、モーセとエリヤに挟まれて描かれています。",
      "それは上部の左右にイエスとその追随者たちの場面があります。",
      "それは2人の人物がユニークな対角線上に横たわっています。",
      "それは中央部分に修道士たちが修道院のセルの外で日常生活を送っている様子を描いています。",
      "それは2層の修道院のセルがあります。",
      "それは上部右側に小さな教会があります。",
      "それは下部左側に小さな階段があります。",
      "それは下部左側に素晴らしい庭園があります。",
      "それは両方のレベルに赤と緑の大理石の柱のあるローマ風アーチウェイがあります。",
      "それは各セルの開口部が同じ幾何学的形状で描かれています。",
      "それは17世紀初頭の修道士たちが着ていた印象的な衣装を描いています。",
      "それは繰り返し現れるモチーフとして祈りの数珠があります。",
      "それは左下に木と小川のある美しい風景を描いています。",
      "それは中景で修道士たちが庭いじりをしています。",
      "それは前景で小さな司祭たちのグループがフェンスの前に集まっています。",
      "それは右側で修道士たちが食事をしています。",
      "それは部屋を明るくする照明付きのランタンの下にテーブルがあります。",
      "それは空中に浮かびながら本を読んでいる修道士がいます。",
      "それは壁に聖母子を描いた伝統的な絵画が飾られています。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それはヴェネツィア絵画の影響を受けたクレタ風建築の複雑さと伝統的なビザンチン様式を特徴としています。",
      "それは部分内の幾何学化が三次元空間を示唆していることを特徴としています。",
      "それはキアロスクーロ技法を用いた画家の見事な光の使い方を特徴としています。",
      "それは三次元空間を特徴としています。"
    ],
    "HeldIn": [
      "それはエジプト、シナイ山、聖カタリナ修道院に所蔵されていました。"
    ],
    "HeldOn": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "Influenced": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "InfluencedBy": [
      "それはヴェネツィア絵画の影響を受けました。",
      "それは伝統的なビザンチン様式の影響を受けました。"
    ],
    "InventedBy": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "InventedIn": [

      "それはクレタの原型です。"

About: It is about the Transfiguration of Jesus.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Mount Sinai.
ConsistsOf: It consists of four main parts.
CreatedBy: It was created by Greek painter Georgios Klontzas.
CreatedIn: It was created on the island of Crete.
HasA: It has tempera and gold leaf on a wood panel.
It has a height of 25.5 in. 64.7 cm.
It has a width of 15.9 in. 40.3 cm.
It has four main parts.
It has Jesus in the center, flanked by Moses and Elijah in the upper portion.
It has scenes with Jesus and his followers to the left and right of the upper portion.
It has two figures lying on a unique diagonal plane.
It has monks in their daily lives standing outside of their monastic cells in the middle portion.
It has two levels of monastic cells.
It has a small church building to the right on the top portion.
It has a small stairwell to the left on the lower level.
It has a fantastic garden on the lower level.
It has Roman archways with red and green marble columns on both levels.
It has openings to each cell painted with the same geometric shapes.
It has impressive attire the monks wore in the early 17th century.
It has prayer beads as a recurring motif.
It has an aesthetically pleasing landscape with trees and a stream to the lower left.
It has monks gardening in the middle ground.
It has a small group of priests gathering in front of a fence in the foreground.
It has monks having a meal to the right.
It has a table below an illuminated lantern that brightens the room.
It has a monk reading from a book while suspended in the air.
It has a traditional painting of the Virgin and Child adorning the wall.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by Cretan architectural complexity influenced by Venetian painting and the traditional Byzantine style.
It is characterized by the geometrization within the section alluding to a three-dimensional space.
It is characterized by the painter's brilliant use of light utilizing a chiaroscuro method.
It is characterized by three-dimensional space.
HeldIn: It was held in Saint Catherine's Monastery in Mount Sinai, Egypt.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by Venetian painting.
It was influenced by the traditional Byzantine style.
IsA: It is a multi-themed tempera painting.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the holy monastery.
It occurred in the early 17th century.
PartOf: It is part of the collection of Saint Catherine's Monastery in Mount Sinai, Egypt.
